name: Thassa's Oracle Consultation
result: Win the game with an empty or nearly empty library.
explanation: Resolve Thassa's Oracle and exile the library with Demonic Consultation before the trigger resolves.

name: Thassa's Oracle Pact
result: Win the game with an empty or nearly empty library.
explanation: Resolve Thassa's Oracle and exile the library with Tainted Pact before the trigger resolves.

name: Isochron Scepter Reversal
result: Potential infinite mana with enough nonland mana sources.
explanation: Imprint Dramatic Reversal on Isochron Scepter and repeatedly untap mana rocks that produce more than the activation costs.

name: Kiki-Jiki Conscripts
explanation: Copy Zealous Conscripts to untap Kiki-Jiki and repeat.

name: Kiki-Jiki Restoration Angel
explanation: Copy Restoration Angel to blink and untap Kiki-Jiki repeatedly.

name: Splinter Twin Pestermite
explanation: Enchant Pestermite with Splinter Twin and untap it with each new token.

name: Splinter Twin Deceiver Exarch
explanation: Enchant Deceiver Exarch with Splinter Twin and untap it with each new token.

name: Basalt Rings
explanation: Copy Basalt Monolith's untap ability to generate extra mana each loop.

name: Basalt Monument
explanation: Forsaken Monument increases Basalt Monolith's mana output enough to loop untaps profitably.

name: Heliod Ballista
result: Infinite damage with lifelink and counters.
explanation: Give Walking Ballista lifelink, deal damage, gain life, and replace the counter.

name: Food Chain Squee
explanation: Repeatedly cast and exile Squee with Food Chain for increasing mana.

name: Food Chain Eternal Scourge
explanation: Repeatedly cast and exile Eternal Scourge with Food Chain for increasing mana.

name: Breach Freeze LED
result: Self-mill loop that can mill opponents or set up a win.
explanation: Use Lion's Eye Diamond and escape Brain Freeze repeatedly with Underworld Breach.

name: Citadel Top Reservoir
result: Draw/cast loop into lethal Aetherflux Reservoir shots.
explanation: Cast Sensei's Divining Top from the top of the library repeatedly while gaining life.
